race.comment: SILVER CHAOS (8) just missed in a stronger race last start at Morphettville and rates highly on the back of that performance in this event. Back to an easier race today and King's claim comes in handy. The race looks to work out well for her today and she can get back to winning ways. ROCKTAGON (12) comes through a good form race at Gawler last time out where he faded out of contention at the front. The wide draw is a query, but his best form stacks right up in this field. Carries no weight today and appears the main danger. JUST LIKE LISA (11) comes back across the border after a 2.3L defeat at Swan Hill 8 days ago. She stood up in this grade there and looks to be trending back toward her best form. Can't be discounted. VEXATIOUS CHOICE (10) is third-up now and can be flying late in the race. SHE REX (9) won well two back before heading straight to town last time out. Back to an easier race here and she can fire.
